---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a frontend improvement or contributor-safe product idea
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem should this solve?


## Proposed Change

What should change in the frontend?


## User Impact

Who benefits, and how would they notice the improvement?


## Scope

- [ ] Frontend-only
- [ ] Needs backend/rules/functions support
- [ ] Needs design or copy review
- [ ] Good first issue candidate
- [ ] Needs discussion before implementation

## Data and Privacy

- Uses personal Orider data: yes / no
- Proposed data or scopes:
- Public/shareable output:
- Privacy considerations:

For Creator Hub or Personal Data API ideas, use only owned-data, demo data, or mocked examples. Do not include tokens, real user IDs, emails, exact private routes, or production exports.

## Alternatives

Any simpler workaround, existing screen, or related issue?
